name: Click Clack Chair Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
Set up a quick and easy sitting space with the Click Clack Chair from Room Essentials™. This armless chair comes complete with seat and back cushions to help you sit in comfort whether you're reading a book, enjoying a cup of tea or just relaxing. Set on a low platform base, this upholstered chair reclines flat and works well as an extra sitting space.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
